# ThoughtSpot.Client.Model.FileReference
Pointer to a code-execution-generated file referenced from a text response item. Full metadata (including expiry) is in the top-level `code_execution_files` map.

## Properties

Name | Type | Description | Notes
------------ | ------------- | ------------- | -------------
**FileId** | **string** | Unique identifier of the code-execution-generated file. | 
**DisplayName** | **string** | Human-readable file name. | [optional] 
**CreatedTimeInMillis** | **Object** | Milliseconds since Unix epoch when the file was created. | [optional]
